'''Zonnos the Great''' was the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who ruled the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] prior to [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]]'s reign. Popara named his firstborn child [[Zonnos Anjiliac Priare]] to honor Zonnos the Great. The junior Zonnos was given an informal nickname of "Zonnos the Lesser" by his peers. That nickname stuck with the younger Hutt even after the elder Zonnos passed on.<ref name="Tempest Feud">''[[Tempest Feud]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1stm}}
